finding_results.notes: Reworked Tiana's side of the bus exchange so she stops repeating assent and instead names both her desperation and desire in her own paperwork-shaped, defensive register while Malik keeps the boundary clear.
finding_results.summary: The exchange now avoids transcript cadence by giving Tiana sharper, leverage-shifting replies instead of three low-information confirmations.

summary: Revised the flagged bus scene so Tiana's dialogue carries more self-exposure and argumentative pressure, preserving Malik's plainspoken boundary-setting without flattening her voice into assent.
